name: everything-university
description: Everything University Skill plus hosted control center.

scripts.bridge:dev: if [ -x apps/bridge/.venv/bin/uvicorn ]; then apps/bridge/.venv/bin/uvicorn app:app --app-dir apps/bridge --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8787; else python3 -m uvicorn app:app --app-dir apps/bridge --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8787; fi
scripts.bridge:test: if [ -x apps/bridge/.venv/bin/python ]; then apps/bridge/.venv/bin/python -m pytest apps/bridge; else python3 -m pytest apps/bridge; fi
scripts.test: npm run web:build && npm run web:test && npm run bridge:test && npm run validate
